title: Fathom/AI Notes Process
excerpt: Does anyone have a good process to automate meeting notes? We use Fathom for call recording and then either use their AI call summary or put the full transcript into ChatGPT and ask it to provide good call notes and acti…

posts.author: DMPartners (Marc Lapides)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone have a good process to automate meeting notes? We use Fathom for call recording and then either use their AI call summary or put the full transcript into ChatGPT and ask it to provide good call notes and action items. I’d like an easy way to get that into Monday. Any thoughts?

posts.author: edarling85 (Wild 6 | Eric Darling)
posts.cookedHtml: Doesn’t Fathom give you all that after a meeting??

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can look at an integration with monday.com and chatgpt OR have you looked at the monday ai notetaker? https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/28017211500434-monday-com-AI-Notetaker

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: edarling85 (Wild 6 | Eric Darling)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s exactly what I use !

I have a whole Make.com scenario and everything that I do.

If you want, I can send you a screenshot of what I have set up.

Or my company can set it up for you.

posts.author: DMPartners (Marc Lapides)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, but I was wondering if there’s a good workflow to get it into Monday. I’d love to have that organized for the whole team to access. (I may have phrased my question poorly.)
